content: Interaction slice: changed viewport navigation so ordinary wheel/scroll moves the camera vertically while trackpad/browser pinch (ctrl-wheel) zooms. Applied the same semantics to SVG 2D views, Prototype flow-map mode, and optional Three.js 3D view. 3D now disables OrbitControls wheel zoom and owns wheel handling: scroll pans along screen-space up/right, ctrl-wheel zooms orthographic/perspective cameras. Updated docs/specs/acceptance text so future agents do not assume wheel zoom. Verification: npx tsc --noEmit, npm test -- --run test/interaction.test.ts test/scene3d.test.ts test/prototype.test.ts, npm run build, npm test (230 passing). Existing untracked reports/ was left untouched. Next: browser-smoke localhost/GitHub Pages interaction on trackpad/mouse and tune gesture direction if user expects inverted scroll direction.
